# Dock dockPreview.v1 producer + hover-affordance rendering (edge/split placements)

## Context

The functional cross-zone tab drag landed (#14857 / PR #14864): `DockTabSortZone` fires `dockCrossZoneDrop` on drop, and the owner reducer hit-tests the zone under the pointer and commits a semantic `moveItem`. That slice commits the model move **directly** from the hit-test â€” it does not yet produce a `neo.harness.dockPreview.v1` object, render the drag-time hover affordance, or use `DockPreview.previewToOperation`. This leaf builds those on the landed scaffold.

## The Problem

Two gaps remain from the full drop-zone producer contract:
1. **No `dockPreview.v1` production.** The reducer maps `(pointer, rendered zone rects) â†’ targetNodeId â†’ moveItem` directly. The ADR-0029 previewâ†’operation model wants `(pointer, rects) â†’ dockPreview.v1{placement} â†’ previewToOperation â†’ descriptor`. Producing the preview object is also what `#14769`'s `CrossWindowDragTarget.previewFor` seam binds to â€” until it exists, `#14769` has no landed compute path (see its blocked-by note).
2. **No drag-time hover affordance.** `AgentOS.view.DockPreview` (the built renderer) is wired nowhere; there is no visual band/guide showing WHERE the tab will land while dragging. And only `tab-into` placement is handled â€” `edge-*` / `split-*` (drop-on-edge â†’ new split) are unhandled.

## The Fix

On drag-move, hit-test the workspace â†’ produce a `dockPreview.v1` with the resolved `placement.kind` (`tab-into` today; add `edge-{top,right,bottom,left}` / `split-{before,after}`); feed `DockPreview` to render the transient affordance; on drop, convert via the landed `DockPreview.previewToOperation()` â†’ `applyDockZoneOperation()` (replacing the direct-`moveItem` shortcut in `MainContainer.onDockCrossZoneDrop`). Add a **unit** test for the hit-test â†’ `placement.kind` mapping (pure `(rects, pointer) â†’ dockPreview.v1`), which the model-move slice deferred.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Hit-test emits a schema-valid `neo.harness.dockPreview.v1` with the correct `placement.kind` for `tab-into` + `edge-*` + `split-*` â€” unit-tested against known rects.
- [ ] `DockPreview` renders the affordance during a live drag (hover band/guide), cleared fail-closed on a `rejected` placement.
- [ ] Drop routes through `previewToOperation` â†’ `applyDockZoneOperation` (the direct-`moveItem` shortcut retired); the `DockCrossZoneDragNL` e2e stays green + gains an edge/split case.
- [ ] Cross-family review.

## Out of Scope

Cross-window transfer (`#14769`, which this unblocks) Â· grouped-node drag (`#14770`).
